verses.text: Tua laitakin Mary leh a unu Martha' omna Bethany khua-ah Lazaras a kici mi khat a ci na hi
Mary i cih pen Jesuh sathau nuhin a sam tawh a nulsaknu hi a, Lazaras pen ama u ahi hi
Tua ahih manin a nau numeite gel in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, na it mipa a ci na hi,” ci-in thu a zasak uh hi

Ahi zongin Jesuh in tua thu a zak ciangin, “Hih natna pen sihna ding natna hilo a, Pasian' Tapa in Pasian' pianzia a neihna mite in a theihna ding, leh Pasian a phattheihna dingin a na ahi hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in Martha-te unau leh Lazaras it mahmah hi
Tua hinapi-in a cinat a zakkhit ciangin tua lai-ah ni nih taam lai veve hi
Tua khit ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Judea gamah paikik ni,” a cih leh
a nungzuite in, “Sia aw, zan mah deuhin Judea gam mite in nang den'lup hong sawm uh ahih manin tua gamah paikik sawm na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin
Jesuh in, “Sun khuavak hun nai sawmlenih sung hilo ahi hiam? Mi khatpeuh tua khuavak sungah lampai leh pukkha cih omlo hi
Ahi zongin zan khuamial sungah lampai leh khuavak neilo ahih manin pukthei hi,” a cih khit ciangin
a nungzuite kiangah, “I lawmpa Lazaras ihmu zo hi. Ahi zongin amah a phong dingin ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a nungzuite in, “Topa aw, amah ihmu ahih leh a nuamtuam hita ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in amah si hi, a cinuam hinapi-in, a nuamtuamin a ihmu hi, a ci-in a nungzuite in ngaihsun uh hi
Tua ahih manin Jesuh in a teltakin gen a, “Lazaras si khinta hi
Ahi zongin note in na uptheihna dingun tua lai-ah kei om khalo ka hih manin note kong khualna-in ka nuam mahmah hi. Ahi zongin tu-in ama kiangah va pai ni,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin, “Unau Peeng,” minno a nei Thomas in, “Ei zong amah tawh a sikhawm dingin va zui ni,” ci-in a nungzuihpihte a zawn hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in A Sisa Mite Thosakin Hingsak Thei

verses.text: Jesuh a tun' ciangin Lazaras a kivui zawh ni li a phak khitna thu a thei hi
Bethany leh Jerusalem kikal tai nih bang bek kigamla ahih manin
a upa uh Lazaras a sihna hangin Martha leh Mary a hehnem dingin Jew mi tampi zong hong pai uh hi
Jesuh hong paina thu Martha in a zak ciangin a dawn dingin va paikhia a, Mary ahih leh a inn mahah omlai hi
Martha in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, hih lai-ah a om hi lecin ka u si hetlo ding hi
Tu nangawnin na nget peuhpeuh Pasian in hong piakding ka thei hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Na u hong thokik ding hi,” a cih leh
Martha in, “Nitawp ni-a thawhkik ni ciangin hong thawhkik ding ka thei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Keimah in a sisa mite thosakin a hingsak theipa ka hi hi. Kei hong um mi peuhmah a sih hangin nungta ding hi
A nungta-a kei hong um mite si ngei nawnlo ding hi. Hih thu na um hiam?” a cih ciangin
“Ka um hi, Topa aw; leitungah a hong pai ding Pasian' Tapa, Khrih na hihna thu ka um hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Tua khit ciangin Martha a inn-ah va tai-in a naunu Mary va huausim a, “Siapa hong pai a, nang hong sam hi,” a ci hi
Tua thu a zak ciangin Mary dingin Jesuh a dawn dingin a paikhia hi
Jesuh, khuasung hong tung nailo a, Martha tawh a kimuhna mun mahah na omlai hi
Amah hehnemin inn-ah a ompih mite in Mary dingin a paikhiatna a muh uh ciangin, hanah a kap dingin a pai ding hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a zui uh hi
Jesuh omna munah Mary tungin amah a muh ciangin ama khe mai-ah bok a, “Topa aw, nang hong om hi lecin ka u si hetlo ding hi,” ci-in a kap hi
Jesuh in Mary leh amah hong zui Jew mite a kahna a muh ciangin a lungsim nakpi takin sukha-in lunggim mahmah ahih manin
“Koi-ah vui na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Topa aw, hong pai in la hong en in,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh zong a kap hi
Tua ahih manin amaute in, “Jesuh in zong Lazaras nak it mahmah hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin pawlkhatte in, “Mittawte khua a musak thei hih mipa in amah a sihlohna dingin bawl theilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
Jesuh a dah hong suak mahmah kik ahih manin leihawm sungah kivui-in suangtum tawh a gong a kihukna hanah a pai hi
A phual a tun' ciangin, “Suangtum likkhia un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin misipa' naunu Martha in, “Topa aw, a kivui zawh ni li phakhin ahih manin uihta ding hi,” a cih leh
Jesuh in, “Na up nak leh Pasian' vangliatna na mu ding hi, ci-in hong genkhin hilo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin a suangtum a likkhia uh hi. Jesuh zong van lam dakto-in, “Pa aw, ka thungetna hong ngai na hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi
Ka thungetna na hong ngaih tawntungna thu ka thei a, ahi zongin hih lai-ah a om mite in kei na hong sawlna thu a uptheihna dingun tu-a bangin kam a hong pau ka hi hi
a cih khit ciangin nakpi takin kiko-in, “Lazaras aw, hong pusuak in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a misipa a khut a khe dial tawh kituamin, a maitang puan tawh a kitunsa-in hong pusuak hi. Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “A dial leh a puante phelkhia un,” a ci hi.
Tua ahih manin Mary kiangah hawhin Jesuh' hihna a mu Jew mi tampi in amah a um uh hi
Ahi zongin amaute pawlkhat Farisi mite kiangah pai-in Jesuh' sep nate a va ko uh hi
Tua ahih manin siampi liante leh Farisi mite in thu vaihawm uliante tawh kikupna khat nei uh a, “Hih mipa in na lamdang tampi bawl ahih manin bangcih ding ihi hiam
Hih bangin omom sak lehang mi khempeuh in amah um ding uh a, Rom kumpite in i Biakinnpi hong suksiat sakin i minambup zong hong sugawp ding uh hi,” a kici uh hi
Tua laitakin amaute sung panin tua kumin siampi lianpen a sem Kaiafas a kici mipa in, “Note in bangmah na thei kei uh hi
I minambup in siatna a thuak sangin i minambup tangin mi khat si leh a hoihzawkna thu phawklo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Hih bangin thu a gen ciangin ama lungsim a gen hilo a, tua kumin siampi lianpen a sem ahihna tawh Jew mite' tangin Jesuh a si ding ahihna thu a genkhol ahi hi
Jew mite-a' ding bek hiloin a kithehthang Pasian' mi khempeuh pumkhat a suahna dingin a kikaihkhopna ding thu zong a genkhol ahi hi
Tua ahih manin tua huna kipanin Jesuh a thahtheihna dingun a vaihawm uh hi
Tua ahih manin Judea gamsungah a kilangin Jesuh khualzin nawnlo a, amah paikhia-in sehnel gam gei-a om Efraim a kici khua-ah tungin tua lai-ah a nungzuite tawh a om hi
Jew mite' Paisan Pawi hun hong nai ciangin, tua pawi kipatma hunsungin biakna vai-in kisian'suahna a bawl dingin gamsung khuate panin Jerusalem khuapi-ah mi tampi hong pai uh hi
Biakinn sungah kikhawmin a om laitakun Jesuh a mu dingin amaute khuadak kawikawi-in kiho uh a, “Jesuh hong pai dingin na um hiam?” ci-in khatlekhat kidong uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi liante leh Farisi mite in Jesuh a mattheihna dingun, “Jesuh a omna a thei na om uh leh hong ko un,” ci-in thupiakna nei khinzo uh hi.
